title: Assistant Store Manager - Landmark Group India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Landmark Group India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Landmark Group India in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Group India:
Landmark Group India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Group India!
